title: Verified Finding
description: ACR-QA Verified Finding v1 — an open schema for exploit-verified, cryptographically-attested security findings. Designed for interoperability with SARIF, SLSA, and Sigstore toolchains.

schema_version.description: Schema version sentinel. Always 'verified-finding/v1' for this version.

finding_id.description: Stable UUID for this finding instance.

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of (rule_id + file + line + snippet). Used for deduplication across scans.

canonical_rule_id.description: ACR-QA canonical rule identifier, e.g. SECURITY-001.

original_rule_id.description: Tool-native rule ID before normalization, e.g. B307, python.lang.security.audit.eval.

category.description: Finding category, e.g. security, quality, complexity.

file.description: Path to the affected file, relative to the repository root.

in_confirmed_tier.description: True if this finding passed all 4 Confirmed Tier criteria (96.4% precision gate).

reachability_signal.description: Strongest reachability signal present. 'exploit' means DAST-verified.

exploit_verification.description: Optional DAST exploit-verification result. Present when exploit_tier != 'unverified'.

tier.description: Three-tier verdict from Docker-sandbox DAST verification.

category.description: Exploit category, e.g. sql-injection, command-injection, ssti.

payload.description: Payload that triggered exploitation, e.g. ' OR 1=1 --

response_evidence.description: Snippet of HTTP response confirming exploitation.

attestation.description: Cryptographic attestation of this finding verdict.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature over the canonical finding payload.

public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the signing public key.

rekor_log_index.description: Sigstore Rekor transparency log entry index.

rekor_entry_uuid.description: Sigstore Rekor entry UUID for tamper-evident audit.

slsa_level.description: SLSA provenance level of the scan that produced this finding.

tool_provenance.description: Provenance of the tool that detected this finding.
